title: dracontomelon mangiferum var. puberulum
intro: Dracontomelon mangiferum var. puberulum, also known as the 'puberulent Dragon's Blood Tree', is a plant species found in Southeast Asia, known for its unique properties and uses. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory issues like bronchitis. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments that can be applied topically to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
